---
id: register-peer
title: "Register a peer"
description: "Register a remote node as a federation peer. The `declaration_sig` field must be a valid Ed25519 signature verifiable against the peer's public key from its `/.well-known/stigmem` endpoint. Registration status begins as `pending_verification` and transitions to `active` or `rejected` after verification. See spec §5.6, §6.1."
sidebar_label: "Register a peer"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"
info_path: docs/api-reference/generated/stigmem-reference-node
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Register a peer"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/v1/federation/peers"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Register a remote node as a federation peer. The `declaration_sig` field must be a valid Ed25519 signature verifiable against the peer's public key from its `/.well-known/stigmem` endpoint. Registration status begins as `pending_verification` and transitions to `active` or `rejected` after verification. See spec §5.6, §6.1.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}

</Heading>
